allow: Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('data/cmdcentre.db'\); const b = db.prepare\('SELECT content FROM briefings ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1'\).get\(\); if \(!b\) { console.log\('NO BRIEFING IN DB'\); process.exit\(0\); } const sensitive = /verif|otp|sso|2fa|magic.link|password.reset|\\b\\d{4,8}\\b.*code|code.*\\b\\d{4,8}\\b/i.test\(b.content\); console.log\(sensitive ? 'SENSITIVE CONTENT DETECTED' : 'CLEAN'\); console.log\('Briefing length:', b.content.length, 'chars'\);")
